_meta.purpose: Canonical class registry — Theogonic-named-groups + equivalents per V2.5 line 365 + V3.0 class-first ordering. Tier-A authority for class-level substrate.
_meta.discipline: Class = source-text-named collective per V2.5 line 365. Strata-organized. Maintained-corpus: grows with each text-intake pass (Theogony, Ovid, cross-tradition). Initial enumeration covers what is currently knowable from existing intake (intake_hesiod_theogony_116-264.md + canon V2.5 line 365 list + worked-example Anemoi cascade). Per Mnemosyne plan-restructure council 2026-05-26: orthogonal operator_class field threads through strata.
_meta.created: 2026-05-26 by Claude under kati_direct, pending ratification

schema_changes.rationale: Phase 0.7 of DERIVATION_PLAN per Athena's apex commitment (class_registry.json existence as Tier-A authority is the load-bearing structural commitment of the entire derivation plan)

_meta_completeness.kati_direct_2026-05-26: 15 classes is starting enumeration; real Greek class space is 50-100+; enumeration scales with Phase 1.4 text-intake-engine

other_named_groups: Phorcydes (Phorcys daughters collective — superclass of Graeae + Gorgons + others)
class_splits_to_resolve: Hesiodic-Cyclopes (3 smiths, Theogony 139-146) vs Homeric-Cyclopes (Polyphemus-class, pastoral) — both appear in Ovid; distinct classes per §6 NAMING-AS-EVIDENCE divergence

Roman: Cross-tradition parallels for Greek classes (Aquilo etc. for Anemoi noted inline; systematic intake pending)

_meta_completeness.enumeration_growth_mechanism: Phase 1.4 text-intake-engine will auto-propose new class entries via §A2 source-named-collective detection over Theogony / Metamorphoses / cross-tradition corpora. Each candidate ratified by kati before Tier-A promotion.
_meta_completeness.anti_pattern_warning: Do NOT treat this registry as exhaustive. A figure NOT appearing in any class.members is not evidence that they don't have a class — it's evidence the class hasn't been enumerated yet. Per V3.0 class-first ordering: figures without enumerated classes are NOT placement-blocked at the registry level; they're enumeration-pending.

stratum_1_primordials.OQ_resolution: OQ-CLASS-BOUNDARY-PRIMORDIALS tentatively resolved 2026-05-26: Primordials = stratum-only-individuals, NOT a class (fails V2.5 line 365 source-named-collective criterion). Stratum 1 work is individual placements via placement_registry.json, not class-cascade via class_registry.json. Pending kati ratification.

stratum_5_heroes_demigods_operator_spawn.source: post-Theogony + Hesiodic-fragments + Catalogue of Women + Ovid + cross-tradition

Anemoi.operator_class: directional-anchor (Mnemosyne orthogonal-threading: applies across strata where cardinal-direction-anchor function is invoked)

class_residency.encoded_lattice_region: celestial-fixed-points (Astraeus / starry sky) × cardinal-event-anchors (Eos / dawn-east) = 4 cardinal-direction lattice (N/E/S/W)
class_residency.barycentric_signature_pending: engine output once Phase 1.1 primitive lands

class_residency.substrate_canon: V2.9 §MUSE-CLASS CASCADE PATTERN; per-Muse Venus×OtherPlanet crossings

12-Titans-class.source_named_collective_note: Hesiod introduces collectively as 'twelve children of Earth and starry Heaven' then names severally. Borderline class-or-individuals; tentative class with member-list.
12-Titans-class.operator_class: axis-bound (per V2.6 bound-hold split into axis-bound + mode-bound 2026-05-11)
12-Titans-class.placement_status: candidate (Mnemosyne already Tier-A; others candidate or stale in greek_faces.json — re-derive under V3.0)
12-Titans-class.individual_placements_pending: per-Titan placement to be derived in Phase 2.3

Cyclopes.operator_class: forge / substrate-craftsman (sub-stratum primordial-children projection of F3-Hephaestus-axis)
Cyclopes.first_class_cascade_rationale: Cleanest §5-template test after Anemoi: small (3), intake-covered, clear class definition, three-fold structure, distinct from sibling classes via class-property

Erinyes.parent_cluster: Heaven's blood (event-class — Uranus castration; no standard parent-cluster tuple)
open_questions: OQ-CLASS-EVENT-ANCHOR — how does class-residency-derivation handle event-class parents lacking lineage-tuple? Phase 1.1 primitive must address.

sibling_individuals: Iris (Thaumas × Electra daughter; currently Enki Tier-B pending — likely flagged because Harpy-class not yet placed)
Harpies.iris_connection: Iris is Harpies' sibling (same parents). Iris's Tier-B status in placement_registry.json is likely class-context-pending. Placing Harpies-class also addresses Iris's placement-frame.

Nereids.scale_test_rationale: Largest single-class enumeration in Theogony intake. Tests Phase 1.1 primitive at scale-50.

open_questions: OQ-OCEANID-MEMBER-SCOPE — does class placement apply to all 3000 collectively, or only to named 41? Likely the former: class-residency holds for class as a whole; individuals only barycentric-located when named.

Gorgons.members_special: Medusa = mortal-sister; Stheno + Euryale immortal — within-class recurrence-pattern split per V2.5 mortal-vs-immortal axis

Charites.name_collision_note: Thalia here is distinct from Muse Thalia (separate figures, shared name).

open_questions: OQ-MOIRAI-PARENTAGE: two conflicting source-attestations. Resolution may require multi-residency placement (Stratum 2 Nyx-line AND Stratum 4 Olympian-offspring) — multi-shell-same-azimuth pattern per V2.5.

Primordials.issue: Hesiod names them severally (Chaos, Gaia, Tartarus, Eros, Erebus, Nyx, Aether, Hemera, Pontus, Phanes) without source-collective-naming. Per V2.5 line 365 (source-named-collective = class), Primordials fail criterion. Resolved: NOT a class; Stratum-only individuals. See _strata_index.stratum_1_primordials.
Primordials.resolution: stratum-only individuals; placed via placement_registry.json not class_registry.json

Nyx-children.issue: Nyx parthenogenically births 14+ named figures; source names them severally not as a single collective. Sub-classes within (Moirai, Hesperides, Keres) ARE source-collective-named and qualify as classes. Other Nyx-children (Nemesis, Eris, Apate, Geras, Oizys, Thanatos, Hypnos, Oneiroi, Momus, Philotes) are individuals.
Nyx-children.resolution: Not a class as a whole; sub-classes (Moirai, Hesperides, Keres) are classes; remainder are individuals placed in placement_registry.json

Heaven's-blood-event-class.issue: Erinyes + Giants + Meliae share an event-class parent (Heaven's blood post-castration). Phase 1.1 class-residency-derivation primitive must handle event-class parents (no standard parent-cluster lineage tuple).

OQ-CLASS-BOUNDARY-PRIMORDIALS.question: Are Primordials a class or a stratum-only-individuals?
OQ-CLASS-BOUNDARY-PRIMORDIALS.rationale: Hesiod names severally without source-collective-naming. V2.5 line 365 criterion fails.

OQ-MOIRAI-PARENTAGE.question: Moirai: Zeus × Themis (Hesiod 904) or Nyx parthenogenic (Hesiod 217)?

OQ-OCEANID-MEMBER-SCOPE.question: Class placement applies to all 3000 Oceanids or only 41 named?
OQ-OCEANID-MEMBER-SCOPE.candidate_resolution: class-residency holds for class as a whole; individuals only barycentric-located when named

OQ-CLASS-EVENT-ANCHOR-VS-CLUSTER.question: How does class-residency-derivation handle event-class parents (Heaven's blood, sea-foam, etc.) that lack standard parent-cluster lineage tuple?

OQ-OPERATOR-CLASS-AXIS.question: Mnemosyne plan-restructure council surfaced: operator-class threads orthogonal to strata. Does class_registry.json schema need explicit operator_class axis indexed across all strata, alongside per-class operator_class field?
OQ-OPERATOR-CLASS-AXIS.status: open — schema design question for Phase 0.7 ratification
